query:
UPDATE workspace_settings
        SET git_app_installations = (
            SELECT jsonb_agg(
                CASE
                    WHEN (elem->>'installation_id')::bigint = $2 THEN $1::jsonb
                    ELSE elem
                END
            )
            FROM jsonb_array_elements(git_app_installations) AS elem
        )
        WHERE workspace_id = $3
